seoTitle: Rodd Point vs Rookhurst — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Rodd Point and Rookhurst. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Rodd Point vs Rookhurst: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Rodd Point and Rookhurst.
heading: Rodd Point vs Rookhurst — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Rodd Point, New South Wales and Rookhurst, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Rodd Point has a lower overall climate risk score (42/100) compared to Rookhurst (49/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Rodd Point or Rookhurst safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Rodd Point has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Rookhurst scores 54/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Rodd Point scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Rookhurst scores 62/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Rodd Point or Rookhurst?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Rodd Point has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
